description_long: This is a conical, brown paper bucket with a wide open top and a narrower base, resembling a disposable cup or waste bin. The exterior surface is matte and has a natural, slightly fibrous paper texture. Around the middle, there is a dark blue or black band featuring a gold or yellow logo and partial text, suggesting branding or labeling, possibly for a business or event. The bucket appears lightweight and is likely hollow, with no visible lid or handles. There are no visible reinforcements or structural bands, and the rim is smooth and unadorned. The object is suitable for holding lightweight contents such as trash, snacks, or promotional items in an urban or public setting.
description: A conical, brown paper bucket with a wide open top, matte texture, and a dark branded band around the middle.
description_view_0: Plain brown paper bucket with no visible markings or labels, showing the smooth conical shape.
description_view_1: Partial view of a dark band with some text visible on the right side of the bucket.
description_view_2: Front view showing the full dark band with a gold logo and partial text, indicating branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side of the bucket with the edge of the dark band and partial text visible.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: dark band with gold logo and partial text
